name: underwrite_loan

fsfScenarios.test: credit_band ge 8 && income_k ge 8 && dti le 3

promptSpec:
Process underwrite_loan(credit_band, income_k, dti) -> (decision, limit_k)

FSF specification:
if (credit_band lt 3) => decision eq 0 && limit_k eq 0
if (credit_band ge 8 && income_k ge 8 && dti le 3) => decision eq 1 && limit_k eq 15
if (credit_band ge 6 && income_k ge 5) => decision eq 1 && limit_k eq 8
if (credit_band ge 3 && dti le 5) => decision eq 2 && limit_k eq 3
others => decision eq 0 && limit_k eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Retail loan underwriting decision table (ordered risk bands)

name: atm_withdraw
promptSpec:
Process atm_withdraw(balance, amount, pin_ok) -> (cash, status)

FSF specification:
if (pin_ok eq 0) => cash eq 0 && status eq 2
if (amount gt balance) => cash eq 0 && status eq 3
if (amount gt 10) => cash eq 0 && status eq 4
if (amount gt 0 && amount le balance) => cash eq amount && status eq 1
others => cash eq 0 && status eq 0

externalProvenance.section: ATM withdraw process (Agile-SOFL / textbook banking pattern, scaled)

name: gate_wire_transfer
promptSpec:
Process gate_wire_transfer(amount, dest_risk, auth_level) -> (allow, hold)

FSF specification:
if (dest_risk ge 4) => allow eq 0 && hold eq 1
if (amount ge 15 && auth_level lt 3) => allow eq 0 && hold eq 1
if (amount ge 8 && auth_level ge 2) => allow eq 1 && hold eq 1
if (amount lt 8 && auth_level ge 1) => allow eq 1 && hold eq 0
others => allow eq 0 && hold eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Wire transfer compliance gate with overlapping amount/auth bands

name: route_call
promptSpec:
Process route_call(qos, trunk_load, vip) -> (route, preempt)

FSF specification:
if (vip eq 1 && qos ge 2) => route eq 1 && preempt eq 1
if (trunk_load ge 9) => route eq 0 && preempt eq 0
if (qos ge 4 && trunk_load le 6) => route eq 2 && preempt eq 0
if (qos ge 2) => route eq 3 && preempt eq 0
others => route eq 0 && preempt eq 0

externalProvenance.section: RF pattern: telecom call routing / overload policy

name: throttle_sms
promptSpec:
Process throttle_sms(rate, spam_score, enterprise) -> (deliver, delay_s)

FSF specification:
if (spam_score ge 8) => deliver eq 0 && delay_s eq 0
if (enterprise eq 1 && rate le 15) => deliver eq 1 && delay_s eq 0
if (rate gt 12 && spam_score ge 4) => deliver eq 0 && delay_s eq 0
if (rate gt 8) => deliver eq 1 && delay_s eq 5
others => deliver eq 0 && delay_s eq 0

externalProvenance.section: SMS gateway rate / spam throttle (first-match)

name: check_badge_access

fsfScenarios.test: clearance ge 1 && zone eq 1 && time_ok eq 1

promptSpec:
Process check_badge_access(clearance, zone, time_ok) -> (open, alarm)

FSF specification:
if (time_ok eq 0 && zone ge 2) => open eq 0 && alarm eq 1
if (clearance ge 4 && zone le 4) => open eq 1 && alarm eq 0
if (clearance ge 2 && zone le 2) => open eq 1 && alarm eq 0
if (clearance ge 1 && zone eq 1 && time_ok eq 1) => open eq 1 && alarm eq 0
others => open eq 0 && alarm eq 0

externalProvenance.section: RF pattern: physical / logical authorization

name: enforce_api_acl
promptSpec:
Process enforce_api_acl(role, scope, mfa) -> (permit, step_up)

FSF specification:
if (role eq 0) => permit eq 0 && step_up eq 0
if (scope ge 3 && mfa eq 0) => permit eq 0 && step_up eq 1
if (role ge 3 && scope le 3) => permit eq 1 && step_up eq 0
if (role ge 1 && scope le 1) => permit eq 1 && step_up eq 0
others => permit eq 0 && step_up eq 0

externalProvenance.section: API ACL with MFA step-up on sensitive scopes

name: dose_alert
promptSpec:
Process dose_alert(weight_kg, age, severity) -> (dose_u, alert)

FSF specification:
if (severity ge 4 && age lt 5) => dose_u eq 0 && alert eq 3
if (age lt 5 && weight_kg lt 8) => dose_u eq 1 && alert eq 2
if (age ge 12 && severity ge 3) => dose_u eq 4 && alert eq 1
if (weight_kg ge 10 && severity ge 1) => dose_u eq 2 && alert eq 0
others => dose_u eq 0 && alert eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Pediatric / adult dosage alert decision table (scaled kg/age)

name: flag_lab_critical

fsfScenarios.test: value ge low && value le high

promptSpec:
Process flag_lab_critical(value, low, high) -> (flag, page)

FSF specification:
if (value lt low && value le 0) => flag eq 3 && page eq 1
if (value lt low) => flag eq 2 && page eq 1
if (value gt high) => flag eq 2 && page eq 1
if (value ge low && value le high) => flag eq 0 && page eq 0
others => flag eq 0 && page eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Lab critical-value paging with overlapping low bands

name: prioritize_pick
promptSpec:
Process prioritize_pick(sla_h, qty, hazmat) -> (wave, special)

FSF specification:
if (hazmat eq 1) => wave eq 0 && special eq 1
if (sla_h le 2 && qty ge 5) => wave eq 1 && special eq 0
if (sla_h le 4) => wave eq 2 && special eq 0
if (qty ge 10) => wave eq 3 && special eq 0
others => wave eq 0 && special eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Warehouse pick-wave prioritization (SLA vs hazmat)

name: compute_reorder
promptSpec:
Process compute_reorder(on_hand, forecast, lead) -> (order_qty, expedite)

FSF specification:
if (on_hand le 0 && forecast gt 0) => order_qty eq 12 && expedite eq 1
if (on_hand le 3 && forecast ge 6) => order_qty eq 8 && expedite eq 1
if (on_hand le 6 && lead ge 5) => order_qty eq 5 && expedite eq 0
if (on_hand gt 6) => order_qty eq 0 && expedite eq 0
others => order_qty eq 0 && expedite eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Inventory reorder / logistics control (textbook-style, scaled)

name: scada_trip
promptSpec:
Process scada_trip(amps, temp_c, relay) -> (trip, alarm)

FSF specification:
if (relay eq 1) => trip eq 1 && alarm eq 2
if (amps ge 15 && temp_c ge 12) => trip eq 1 && alarm eq 2
if (amps ge 12 || temp_c ge 14) => trip eq 0 && alarm eq 1
if (amps ge 8) => trip eq 0 && alarm eq 1
others => trip eq 0 && alarm eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Feeder overcurrent / temperature trip ladder (ordered)

name: dispatch_grid
promptSpec:
Process dispatch_grid(load, renewable, reserve) -> (source, shed)

FSF specification:
if (load gt renewable && reserve lt 2) => source eq 1 && shed eq 1
if (renewable ge load) => source eq 2 && shed eq 0
if (reserve ge 5) => source eq 3 && shed eq 0
if (load gt 0) => source eq 1 && shed eq 0
others => source eq 0 && shed eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Microgrid dispatch with overlapping renewable/reserve guards

name: upgrade_seat
promptSpec:
Process upgrade_seat(tier, overbook, hours_to_dep) -> (cabin, voucher)

FSF specification:
if (overbook ge 3 && hours_to_dep le 2) => cabin eq 0 && voucher eq 2
if (tier ge 4 && hours_to_dep le 6) => cabin eq 2 && voucher eq 0
if (tier ge 2 && overbook le 1) => cabin eq 1 && voucher eq 0
if (tier ge 1) => cabin eq 0 && voucher eq 1
others => cabin eq 0 && voucher eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Airline involuntary / elite upgrade decision table

name: apply_fare_rule
promptSpec:
Process apply_fare_rule(advance_d, flex, intl) -> (fare_band, change_fee)

FSF specification:
if (intl eq 1 && advance_d lt 3) => fare_band eq 4 && change_fee eq 3
if (advance_d ge 14 && flex eq 0) => fare_band eq 1 && change_fee eq 2
if (flex eq 1) => fare_band eq 3 && change_fee eq 0
if (advance_d ge 7) => fare_band eq 2 && change_fee eq 1
others => fare_band eq 0 && change_fee eq 0

name: quote_auto_premium
promptSpec:
Process quote_auto_premium(age, claims, risk) -> (premium, decline)

FSF specification:
if (claims ge 4) => premium eq 0 && decline eq 1
if (age lt 4 && risk ge 3) => premium eq 12 && decline eq 0
if (age ge 12 && risk ge 2) => premium eq 9 && decline eq 0
if (risk ge 2) => premium eq 6 && decline eq 0
others => premium eq 0 && decline eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Auto insurance quote bands (age scaled; claims hard decline)

name: triage_claim
promptSpec:
Process triage_claim(amount, fraud_score, injury) -> (queue, siu)

FSF specification:
if (fraud_score ge 7) => queue eq 0 && siu eq 1
if (injury eq 1 && amount ge 8) => queue eq 1 && siu eq 0
if (amount ge 10) => queue eq 2 && siu eq 0
if (amount ge 3) => queue eq 3 && siu eq 0
others => queue eq 0 && siu eq 0

externalProvenance.section: RF pattern: boundary screening applied to claims triage

name: select_phase
promptSpec:
Process select_phase(queue_ns, queue_ew, ped) -> (phase, extend)

FSF specification:
if (ped eq 1 && queue_ns le 2) => phase eq 4 && extend eq 0
if (queue_ns ge 8) => phase eq 1 && extend eq 1
if (queue_ew ge 8) => phase eq 2 && extend eq 1
if (queue_ns ge queue_ew) => phase eq 1 && extend eq 0
others => phase eq 0 && extend eq 0

name: meter_ramp
promptSpec:
Process meter_ramp(mainline, ramp_q, incident) -> (rate, close)

FSF specification:
if (incident eq 1) => rate eq 0 && close eq 1
if (mainline ge 14 && ramp_q ge 5) => rate eq 1 && close eq 0
if (mainline ge 10) => rate eq 2 && close eq 0
if (ramp_q ge 3) => rate eq 3 && close eq 0
others => rate eq 0 && close eq 0

name: cdn_cache_policy
promptSpec:
Process cdn_cache_policy(hit_rate, size_mb, ttl) -> (action, ttl_new)

FSF specification:
if (ttl le 0) => action eq 2 && ttl_new eq 0
if (hit_rate ge 15 && size_mb le 5) => action eq 1 && ttl_new eq 10
if (hit_rate ge 8 && ttl le 5) => action eq 1 && ttl_new eq 8
if (size_mb ge 12) => action eq 2 && ttl_new eq 0
others => action eq 0 && ttl_new eq 0

name: limit_api_rate
promptSpec:
Process limit_api_rate(rps, burst, plan) -> (allow, retry_after)

FSF specification:
if (plan ge 3) => allow eq 1 && retry_after eq 0
if (rps gt 15 && burst gt 8) => allow eq 0 && retry_after eq 10
if (rps gt 10 && plan ge 2) => allow eq 1 && retry_after eq 2
if (rps gt 10) => allow eq 0 && retry_after eq 5
others => allow eq 0 && retry_after eq 0

name: library_borrow
promptSpec:
Process library_borrow(member_ok, copies, fines) -> (loaned, block)

FSF specification:
if (member_ok eq 0) => loaned eq 0 && block eq 1
if (fines ge 5) => loaned eq 0 && block eq 1
if (copies ge 1 && fines le 2) => loaned eq 1 && block eq 0
if (copies ge 1) => loaned eq 0 && block eq 1

name: library_renew
promptSpec:
Process library_renew(times_renewed, holds, overdue_d) -> (renewed, due_extend)

FSF specification:
if (holds ge 1) => renewed eq 0 && due_extend eq 0
if (overdue_d ge 3) => renewed eq 0 && due_extend eq 0
if (times_renewed ge 3) => renewed eq 0 && due_extend eq 0
if (times_renewed le 2 && overdue_d eq 0) => renewed eq 1 && due_extend eq 2
others => renewed eq 0 && due_extend eq 0

name: control_tank_level
promptSpec:
Process control_tank_level(level, inflow, demand) -> (pump, drain)

FSF specification:
if (level ge 16) => pump eq 0 && drain eq 1
if (level ge 12 && demand lt inflow) => pump eq 0 && drain eq 1
if (level le 4 && inflow gt 0) => pump eq 1 && drain eq 0
if (level ge 5 && level le 11) => pump eq 0 && drain eq 0
others => pump eq 0 && drain eq 0

name: boiler_interlock
promptSpec:
Process boiler_interlock(pressure, flame, water_ok) -> (fuel, lockout)

FSF specification:
if (water_ok eq 0) => fuel eq 0 && lockout eq 1
if (pressure ge 14) => fuel eq 0 && lockout eq 1
if (flame eq 0 && pressure ge 5) => fuel eq 0 && lockout eq 0
if (flame eq 1 && pressure le 12) => fuel eq 1 && lockout eq 0
others => fuel eq 0 && lockout eq 0

name: screen_card_fraud
promptSpec:
Process screen_card_fraud(amount, velocity, geo_risk) -> (block, challenge)

FSF specification:
if (geo_risk ge 4) => block eq 1 && challenge eq 0
if (amount ge 12 && velocity ge 6) => block eq 1 && challenge eq 0
if (amount ge 6 && velocity ge 3) => block eq 0 && challenge eq 1
if (amount le 5) => block eq 0 && challenge eq 0
others => block eq 0 && challenge eq 0

name: score_login_anomaly
promptSpec:
Process score_login_anomaly(fail_count, new_device, geo_shift) -> (lock, mfa)

FSF specification:
if (fail_count ge 5) => lock eq 1 && mfa eq 0
if (new_device eq 1 && geo_shift eq 1) => lock eq 0 && mfa eq 1
if (fail_count ge 3 || geo_shift eq 1) => lock eq 0 && mfa eq 1
if (new_device eq 1) => lock eq 0 && mfa eq 1

name: enroll_course
promptSpec:
Process enroll_course(credits, prereq, seats) -> (enrolled, waitlist)

FSF specification:
if (prereq eq 0) => enrolled eq 0 && waitlist eq 0
if (seats le 0 && credits le 15) => enrolled eq 0 && waitlist eq 1
if (credits ge 12 && seats ge 1) => enrolled eq 1 && waitlist eq 0
if (seats ge 1) => enrolled eq 1 && waitlist eq 0

name: enroll_benefit

Process enroll_benefit(tenure_y, hours, open_enroll) -> (eligible, plan)

FSF specification:
if (open_enroll eq 0 && tenure_y lt 1) => eligible eq 0 && plan eq 0
if (hours ge 12 && tenure_y ge 1) => eligible eq 1 && plan eq 2
if (hours ge 8 && open_enroll eq 1) => eligible eq 1 && plan eq 1

name: award_bonus

FSF specification:
if (budget_ok eq 0) => bonus_pct eq 0 && raise_pct eq 0

if (perf ge 5) => bonus_pct eq 12 && raise_pct eq 5

name: compute_overtime
promptSpec:
Process compute_overtime(hours, night, holiday) -> (mult_x10, premium)

FSF specification:
if (holiday eq 1) => mult_x10 eq 20 && premium eq 1
if (night eq 1 && hours gt 8) => mult_x10 eq 15 && premium eq 1
if (hours gt 8) => mult_x10 eq 15 && premium eq 0
if (hours le 8 && night eq 1) => mult_x10 eq 12 && premium eq 1

name: crossing_approach
promptSpec:
Process crossing_approach(train_dist, gate_pos, fault) -> (cmd, alarm)

FSF specification:
if (fault gt 0) => cmd eq 0 && alarm eq 2
if (train_dist le 3 && gate_pos ge 2) => cmd eq 2 && alarm eq 1
if (train_dist le 3 && gate_pos eq 1) => cmd eq 1 && alarm eq 1
if (train_dist ge 8 && gate_pos eq 0) => cmd eq 3 && alarm eq 0

name: crossing_clear_check

fsfScenarios.test: occupancy eq 0 && gate_pos eq 0 && timer ge 2

promptSpec:
Process crossing_clear_check(occupancy, gate_pos, timer) -> (permit, status)

FSF specification:
if (occupancy gt 0) => permit eq 0 && status eq 2
if (gate_pos gt 0) => permit eq 0 && status eq 1
if (timer lt 2) => permit eq 0 && status eq 1
if (occupancy eq 0 && gate_pos eq 0 && timer ge 2) => permit eq 1 && status eq 0
others => permit eq 0 && status eq 0

name: route_lock

fsfScenarios.test: route_req gt 0 && conflict eq 0 && point_ok gt 0

Process route_lock(route_req, conflict, point_ok) -> (locked, reject)

FSF specification:
if (conflict gt 0) => locked eq 0 && reject eq 2
if (point_ok eq 0) => locked eq 0 && reject eq 1

Process signal_aspect(route_locked, block_clear, override) -> (aspect, restrict)

FSF specification:
if (override gt 0) => aspect eq 0 && restrict eq 1
if (route_locked eq 0) => aspect eq 0 && restrict eq 1
if (route_locked gt 0 && block_clear eq 0) => aspect eq 1 && restrict eq 1
if (route_locked gt 0 && block_clear gt 0) => aspect eq 2 && restrict eq 0
others => aspect eq 0 && restrict eq 0

name: point_move_permit

Process point_move_permit(locked, occupied, cmd) -> (move, deny)

FSF specification:
if (locked gt 0) => move eq 0 && deny eq 2

name: atm_auth

FSF specification:
if (card_ok eq 0) => auth eq 0 && retain eq 1
if (tries ge 3) => auth eq 0 && retain eq 1
if (pin_ok eq 0) => auth eq 0 && retain eq 0

name: hotel_book

FSF specification:

name: transfer_guard

Process transfer_guard(balance, amount, daily_left) -> (ok, reason)

FSF specification:
if (amount le 0) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 1
if (amount gt balance) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 2
if (amount gt daily_left) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 3

name: fraud_hold

Process fraud_hold(risk, amount, new_device) -> (hold, challenge)

if (new_device gt 0 && amount ge 5) => hold eq 1 && challenge eq 1

name: atm_transfer

Process atm_transfer(auth, balance, amount, xfer_cap) -> (ok, reason)

name: atm_inquire

if (auth eq 0) => show eq 0 && deny eq 1

name: daily_withdraw_cap

Process daily_withdraw_cap(auth, amount, remaining) -> (cash, status)

name: route_conflict_check

Process route_conflict_check(req_a, req_b, share_plat) -> (conflict, allow)

name: flank_protect

Process flank_protect(route_set, flank_clear, override) -> (proceed, block)

if (route_set eq 0) => proceed eq 0 && block eq 1

name: approach_lock
promptSpec:
Process approach_lock(train_app, signal_clear, timer) -> (locked, release)

FSF specification:
if (train_app gt 0 && signal_clear gt 0) => locked eq 1 && release eq 0
if (train_app gt 0 && timer lt 3) => locked eq 1 && release eq 0

name: signal_clear_permit

fsfScenarios.test: route_ok gt 0 && track_clear gt 0 && fault eq 0

promptSpec:
Process signal_clear_permit(route_ok, track_clear, fault) -> (clear, restrict)

FSF specification:
if (fault gt 0) => clear eq 0 && restrict eq 2
if (route_ok eq 0) => clear eq 0 && restrict eq 1
if (track_clear eq 0) => clear eq 0 && restrict eq 1

name: library_borrow

fsfScenarios.test: member_ok gt 0 && overdue eq 0 && copies gt 0

promptSpec:
Process library_borrow(member_ok, copies, overdue) -> (loan, deny)

FSF specification:
if (member_ok eq 0) => loan eq 0 && deny eq 2
if (overdue gt 0) => loan eq 0 && deny eq 1
if (copies le 0) => loan eq 0 && deny eq 1
if (member_ok gt 0 && overdue eq 0 && copies gt 0) => loan eq 1 && deny eq 0
others => loan eq 0 && deny eq 0

name: library_return
promptSpec:
Process library_return(loan_active, days_late) -> (closed, fine)

FSF specification:
if (loan_active eq 0) => closed eq 0 && fine eq 0
if (days_late gt 0) => closed eq 1 && fine eq 1
if (loan_active gt 0 && days_late eq 0) => closed eq 1 && fine eq 0
others => closed eq 0 && fine eq 0

name: water_tank_control
promptSpec:
Process water_tank_control(level, inflow, alarm) -> (valve, pump)

FSF specification:
if (alarm gt 0) => valve eq 0 && pump eq 0
if (level ge 9) => valve eq 0 && pump eq 0
if (level le 2) => valve eq 1 && pump eq 1
if (level gt 2 && level lt 9) => valve eq 1 && pump eq 0
others => valve eq 0 && pump eq 0

name: hotel_checkout

fsfScenarios.test: occupied gt 0 && paid gt 0 && damage eq 0

promptSpec:
Process hotel_checkout(occupied, paid, damage) -> (release, bill)

FSF specification:
if (occupied eq 0) => release eq 0 && bill eq 0
if (paid eq 0) => release eq 0 && bill eq 2
if (damage gt 0) => release eq 0 && bill eq 1
if (occupied gt 0 && paid gt 0 && damage eq 0) => release eq 1 && bill eq 0
others => release eq 0 && bill eq 0

name: access_badge

fsfScenarios.test: badge_ok gt 0 && time_ok gt 0 && zone lt 3

Process access_badge(badge_ok, zone, time_ok) -> (open, alarm)

FSF specification:
if (badge_ok eq 0) => open eq 0 && alarm eq 2
if (time_ok eq 0) => open eq 0 && alarm eq 1
if (zone ge 3 && badge_ok gt 0) => open eq 0 && alarm eq 1
if (badge_ok gt 0 && time_ok gt 0 && zone lt 3) => open eq 1 && alarm eq 0
others => open eq 0 && alarm eq 0

name: med_dose_check

fsfScenarios.test: allergy eq 0 && dose gt 0 && dose le weight

promptSpec:
Process med_dose_check(weight, dose, allergy) -> (approve, flag)

FSF specification:
if (allergy gt 0) => approve eq 0 && flag eq 2
if (dose le 0) => approve eq 0 && flag eq 1
if (dose gt weight) => approve eq 0 && flag eq 1
if (allergy eq 0 && dose gt 0 && dose le weight) => approve eq 1 && flag eq 0

name: power_trip_protect
promptSpec:
Process power_trip_protect(current, temp, manual) -> (trip, warn)

FSF specification:
if (manual gt 0) => trip eq 1 && warn eq 2
if (current ge 9) => trip eq 1 && warn eq 2
if (temp ge 8) => trip eq 1 && warn eq 1
if (current lt 9 && temp lt 8) => trip eq 0 && warn eq 0
others => trip eq 0 && warn eq 0

name: traffic_signal_priority
promptSpec:
Process traffic_signal_priority(emergency, ped, phase) -> (light, hold)

FSF specification:
if (emergency gt 0) => light eq 0 && hold eq 2
if (ped gt 0 && phase eq 1) => light eq 1 && hold eq 1
if (phase eq 2) => light eq 2 && hold eq 0
if (phase eq 0) => light eq 0 && hold eq 0
others => light eq 0 && hold eq 0

name: insurance_claim_triage

fsfScenarios.test: fraud_score lt 8 && docs_ok gt 0 && amount lt 9

promptSpec:
Process insurance_claim_triage(fraud_score, amount, docs_ok) -> (pay, review)

FSF specification:
if (fraud_score ge 8) => pay eq 0 && review eq 2
if (docs_ok eq 0) => pay eq 0 && review eq 1
if (amount ge 9) => pay eq 0 && review eq 1
if (fraud_score lt 8 && docs_ok gt 0 && amount lt 9) => pay eq 1 && review eq 0

name: inventory_reorder
promptSpec:
Process inventory_reorder(stock, reorder_pt, on_order) -> (order, qty)

FSF specification:
if (on_order gt 0) => order eq 0 && qty eq 0
if (stock le reorder_pt) => order eq 1 && qty eq 2
if (stock gt reorder_pt) => order eq 0 && qty eq 0
others => order eq 0 && qty eq 0
